summary: Excellent soundboard recording with a standout Scarlet Begonias → Fire on the Mountain sequence
review: The Miller/Gastwirt‑mastered soundboard capture is praised as essentially flawless after an initial balloon‑drop pop that settles by the first major jam. Reviewers hail this performance—especially the Scarlet>Fire transition—as the best version they’ve heard, making it an essential download.

ai_rating.rationale: A single five‑star review highlights both superb musical performance and high‑quality recording (minor initial noise), leading to a strong combined rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Initial balloon drop and popping noise in the opener, but clarity and balance settle quickly; overall crisp and well‑mastered.

standout_songs: Scarlet Begonias > Fire on the Mountain
show_quality.setlist_flow: A noisy opening fades into a tight, high‑energy set; the Scarlet>Fire sequence is highlighted as a peak moment.
